mapper.select: SELECT d.id, p.PointName,t.Kind,d.`Data`,t.Unit,d.Date from pipelineinfo p RIGHT JOIN sensortype t ON p.id=t.id INNER JOIN sensordata d ON d.SensorId = p.id
SELECT d.id, p.PointName,t.Kind,d.`Data`,t.Unit,d.Date from pipelineinfo p RIGHT JOIN sensortype t ON p.id=t.id INNER JOIN sensordata d ON d.SensorId = p.id WHERE p.PointName =#{PointName}
SELECT d.id, p.PointName,t.Kind,d.`Data`,t.Unit,d.Date from pipelineinfo p RIGHT JOIN sensortype t ON p.id=t.id INNER JOIN sensordata d ON d.SensorId = p.id WHERE t.Kind =#{Kind}
